title: Kerala Assembly polls: Congress leaders criticise Pinarayi Vijayan’s remarks against Revanth Reddy
description: Senior Congress leader Thiruvanchoor Radhakrishnan, contesting from Kottayam, joked that the Chief Minister was ‘abusing someone’ on his way out. K. Muraleedharan, the party candidate from Vattiyurkavu, echoed that the Chief Minister was setting ‘a poor example’ for the younger generation
